## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change.

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace --locked`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --locked -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Packaging or platform-specific checks, when relevant

## UI and assets

- [ ] Screenshots are attached for visible UI changes, or this change has no UI impact.
- [ ] New media is original or has documented redistribution rights, or this change adds no media.
- [ ] English and Simplified Chinese text are both updated, or this change adds no user-facing text.

## Safety

- [ ] This change does not modify the official Codex app, signatures, credentials, or API configuration.
